Garth the grumpy neighbor meets chaos as the wind blows his trash cans down the road and leaves a trail of stinky garbage.
A stuttering toddler with chocolate all over his face accidentally walks into the laundry room and causes a silly mess.
Tunny the seahorse escapes near Granite Run Mall and turns the shopping area into a goofy chase scene.
Two siblings pedal through crunchy fall leaves when a gust of wind sends decorations flying across their street.
A little girl drops her giant ice cream in the park and invents a ridiculous cleanup team to save the day.
A friendly fuzzy monster tries to help kids at the bus stop but keeps making the morning even sillier.
A nervous crossing guard loses control of a parade of runaway scooters on the first day of school.
A kid dressed as a pirate brings a pet chicken to a library story hour and everything goes sideways.
A goofy dog steals a mayor's sandwich during a windy town picnic and sparks a chase through the gazebo.
A pair of twins accidentally launch balloons full of confetti into a sleepy neighborhood block party.
A sneezy wizard tries to help clean a bakery but keeps enchanting the bread into silly shapes.
A tiny dragon hides in a classroom backpack and turns show-and-tell into a smoky disaster.
A marching band tuba rolls down Main Street during a school parade and everyone races to stop it.
A soccer goalie slips on pudding during practice and accidentally starts a chain reaction of falling cones.
A sleepy mail carrier delivers a package full of squeaky rubber ducks to the wrong porch at sunrise.
A group of campers wakes up to find a raccoon wearing their counselor's hat and leading a pancake theft.
A shy robot helper spills glitter in the art room and turns cleanup time into a sparkling scramble.
A llama escapes from a petting zoo and wanders into a farmers market tasting table.
A substitute teacher tries to organize a science fair while a box of crickets gets loose in the gym.
A kid on roller skates crashes into a pile of leaf rakes and launches them across the neighborhood.
A grandma with a booming laugh enters a silent library contest and accidentally causes a giggle riot.
A tiny alien mistakes a backyard sprinkler for a spaceship wash station and floods the picnic.
A baker's apprentice sneezes into cupcake frosting and the decorations slide across the counter like sleds.
A class hamster escapes during picture day and scampers through a mountain of costume props.
A magician's rabbit steals the principal's lunch and hides clues all over the school hallway.
A beach lifeguard chases a runaway umbrella that keeps scooping up strangers like a sail.
A kid's homemade soapbox car zooms into a birthday party and topples the balloon arch.
A trombone player gets hiccups during a concert in the town square and starts a musical commotion.
A puppy wearing rain boots splashes through a puddle relay race at recess.
A museum janitor discovers a flock of pigeons nesting in the dinosaur exhibit before opening time.
A grocery cart full of watermelons rolls loose in a parking lot during a windy afternoon.
A junior reporter interviews the town mascot right as the giant costume head gets stuck in a revolving door.
A camping trip turns chaotic when a squirrel drags off the bag of marshmallows and everyone gives chase.
A snow day sled train crashes into a stack of recycling bins at the end of the driveway.
A choir rehearsal gets interrupted when the conductor's pet parrot starts copying every warm-up note.
A little league coach loses his clipboard in a mud puddle and invents silly signals to keep practice going.
A school bus full of field trip kids spots a runaway goat in a superhero cape near the museum steps.
A pair of cousins building a lemonade stand accidentally glue their sneakers to the sidewalk.
A girl with a giant bubble wand creates a bubble so big it floats her hat into a fountain.
A diner waitress balances too many milkshakes just as a tap-dancing pigeon hops onto the counter.
A community theater rehearsal turns wild when the fake castle wall tips over into the snack table.
A birthday clown loses control of a suitcase full of squeaky toy chickens in the park.
A skateboard contest at the cul-de-sac gets interrupted by a leaf blower that won't stop spinning in circles.
A school janitor tries to wax the hallway while a parade of kindergartners tracks in autumn mud.
A young inventor tests a sandwich-launching machine during lunch period and sprays the cafeteria.
A tiny pony wanders into a car wash and startles everyone with a foamy shake.
A kite festival gets chaotic when one stubborn kite drags a picnic blanket across the field.
A hotel bellhop chases a luggage cart that rolls into a wedding cupcake display.
A zookeeper loses a bucket of fish and the penguins parade after it through the visitor center.
A spelling bee finalist drops a jar of jellybeans on the auditorium stairs right before the last word.
A kid's cardboard robot costume gets stuck in the school turnstile and causes a traffic jam of backpacks.
A neighborhood yard sale turns rowdy when a remote-control dinosaur starts roaring at every customer.
A firehouse open house gets sillier when the mascot dalmatian steals all the hot dog buns.
A science camp volcano demo erupts early and coats the counselor's bike in sticky foam.
A bakery delivery bicycle tips over outside city hall and rolls baguettes into a fountain.
A playground talent show spirals when a unicycle clown bumps the microphone stand into the judges' table.
